result.stdout:
Forth.Net.Program 2.0.10
2020 Ⓒ Luca Bolognese 
Usage: nforth [Forth files] [Options]

  -e, --exec [forthstring]    Execute forthstring after starting up.
  -v, --verbose               Produce verbose output.
  -s, --hidestack             Hides the stack banner.
  -d, --dictsize              Size of the words dictionary in bytes.
  -p, --paramsize             Size of the parameter stack in bytes.
  -r, --returnsize            Size of the return stack in bytes.
  --help                      Display this help screen.
  --version                   Display version information.
  Forth files (pos. 0)        Optional Forth files to compile or execute.

EXAMPLES:

forth

forth Test1.fth Test2.fth -e bye

forth Test1.fth Test2.fth -o Forth.fim
